title: elytrigia corsica
intro: Elytrigia corsica, also known as Corsican wheatgrass or Corsican bent grass, is a perennial grass species native to the island of Corsica. It is used as a medicinal plant due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, gastrointestinal problems, and skin conditions, and has been shown to have anti-cancer and anti-bacterial properties. Elytrigia corsica can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a digestive aid and to reduce inflammation.
